constraints_2_content: After running `npm install`, wait for the command to fully complete (set a duration of at least 60 seconds) and inspect the terminal output for warnings or peer-dependency errors before proceeding to the next step.
constraints_2_rationale: npm install in a React project can be slow and produce peer-dep warnings; the duration setting is Terminus2Agent-specific, and the react-otp-input dependency makes this task-specific.
constraints_3_content: After editing each `.js` file, immediately run `cat <filepath>` to visually confirm the saved content matches the intended change before moving on to the next file.
constraints_3_rationale: With four JS files to modify sequentially, this per-file verification step is critical to catch write errors early; uses shell cat in the tmux environment.
constraints_4_content: Before starting the dev server, check whether port 3000 is already occupied by running `lsof -i :3000` or `ss -tlnp | grep 3000`; if it is, kill the existing process first.
constraints_4_rationale: Port conflicts are a common failure mode when verifying the dev server; this is specific to the React dev server verification requirement in this task.
constraints_5_content: When running `npm run build`, set `commands.duration` to at least 120 seconds to accommodate webpack bundling time; do not assume the build is complete before the terminal prompt returns.
constraints_5_rationale: React production builds are time-consuming; the duration field is Terminus2Agent-specific and the build step is task-specific.
constraints_6_content: Use `grep -n 'forwardRef\|ref=' src/CustomInput.js` to verify that `React.forwardRef` and the forwarded `ref` attribute are present in the file after editing it.
constraints_6_rationale: Grep is used here to do a targeted post-edit sanity check specific to the forwardRef fix, which is a core requirement of this task.
constraints_7_content: After the dev server starts, tail `/app/server.log` with `tail -n 50 /app/server.log` to confirm the 'Compiled successfully' message appears before marking the server as running.
constraints_7_rationale: Simply launching the server is insufficient; the log must be inspected for successful compilation, and this is done via shell in the tmux environment.
